query:
SELECT 
  id,
  keyword,
  postText,
  likes,
  likesPerDay,
  funnelStage,
  opener50,
  charLen,
  hasNumber,
  questionMark,
  youFlag,
  iFlag,
  ctaFlag,
  resultFlag,
  turnFlag
FROM viral_examples
WHERE likes >= 3000
ORDER BY likes DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT 
  id,
  keyword,
  postText,
  likes,
  likesPerDay,
  funnelStage,
  opener50,
  charLen,
  hasNumber,
  questionMark,
  youFlag,
  iFlag,
  ctaFlag,
  resultFlag,
  turnFlag
FROM viral_examples
WHERE likes >= 3000
ORDER BY likes DESC
LIMIT 10;
